name: Potato, Pepper and Tomato Casserole W/Morocca
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Mild Red or White Wine (or vinegar)
1 1/2 lb Fingerling or red Potatoes, sliced into halves if using fingerlings or cut into 1/2-inch thick rounds or quarter rounds if using round potatoes
1 large Red Bell Pepper, cut into 1 1/2-inch squares
1 large Green Bell Pepper, cut into 1 1/2-inch squares
1 large Yellow Bell Pepper, cut into 1 1/2-inch squares
1 lb Red or Yellow Tomatoes, cut into eights
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the sauce: In a mortar and pestle or food processor, crush garlic with salt, paprika, cumin, and cayenne until it forms a fairly uniform paste.
2. Add herbs and bruise them with a few poundsings of the pestle. Stir in lemon juice, vinegar, and olive oil. Season with salt to taste.
3. To prepare vegetables: If using fingerlings, slice them into halves lengthwise. If using round potatoes, slice into 1/2-inch thick rounds or quarter rounds.
4. Place potatoes, bell peppers, and celery in a bowl, season with salt, and toss with the sauce.
5. Transfer to a large, shallow baking dish; intersperse tomatoes among the potato mixture.
6. Drizzle oil over the top, cover with foil, and bake for 35 minutes at 350 degrees.
7. Remove foil and bake for an additional 20 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Serves 4 to 6. Per serving: 285 calories; 4g protein; 7g fat; 52g carbohydrates; 0 cholesterol; 60mg sodium; 6g fiber; Vegan/Vegetarian.
